input.currentText: [fixture] You've shown BC and Sweden, and those are strong cases. I'll narrow my claim — carbon taxes work where enforcement is stable, over 5+ year horizons. I'm not defending the universal version anymore.
input.parentText: [fixture] Carbon taxes reduce emissions everywhere they are tried.
input.threadContextExcerpt: [fixture] Debate room: one side has the stronger evidentiary position; the other narrows. Doctrine test — must NOT be labeled with who-is-winning framing.
